message:
WASM print() support via WASI target

- Switch WASM target from freestanding to wasm32-wasi
- Enables std.debug.print (fd_write syscall)
- DCE removes WASI overhead when print not used (113B vs 4.5KB)
- Rename user's def main() to __user_main to avoid conflict
- Track has_user_main in analyzer for entry point generation
